case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1128 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Counsel for the Petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this Petition being barred by Article 212 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, as the Petitioner was a Civil Servant vide order dated 20.12.2022. Thereafter no one has turned up to pursue this petition, which prima facie suggests that the Petitioner and his Counsel have lost their interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
